evals.prompt: REPLACE: A design brief with target dimensions, platform (Instagram/web/ad), brand colors, purpose, and content requirements
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: Description of ideal design output (SVG, React component, HTML+CSS, etc.)

assertions.text: Output dimensions match the spec (e.g., 1080x1350 for Instagram, 1920x1080 for web)
Brand accent color #ED0D51 is present in the code
Background color matches spec (#0D0D0D for dark/Instagram, #FFFFFF for light/web)
Headline font-family declaration includes Big Shoulders or specified brand font
Body font-family declaration includes Manrope or specified brand font
Headline text size is 48px or larger (or equivalent Tailwind class text-5xl+)
Padding or margin of 40-80px (or equivalent Tailwind p-10 to p-20) on content container
No more than 15 words per individual slide, card, or content block
No AI-slop visual patterns (generic blob people, unnecessary 3-column grids, purple/blue gradients, stock photo placeholders)
All visual elements are contained within the canvas with proper margins — nothing overflows or clips

evals.prompt: REPLACE: A second design brief for a different platform or format to test versatility
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: Description of expected design output

assertions.text: Output dimensions match the target platform spec
Brand colors are used consistently (accent for emphasis only, not dominant)
Typography hierarchy is clear — headline visually distinct from body text
Layout has clear visual hierarchy guiding the eye from top to bottom
Text is legible at the target platform's viewing size
Whitespace is used intentionally — not cramped, not empty
Code output is valid and renderable (no syntax errors, unclosed tags, or broken references)
Color contrast ratio between text and background meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 minimum)
The design communicates its message without requiring additional explanation
Responsive considerations are addressed if the output is web-based
